Created attachment 200354
Patch

This release adds backwards compatibility with the original unclutter by supporting all command-line flags in the sense that at the very least they do not cause an error.

Full changelog: https://github.com/Airblader/unclutter-xfixes/compare/v1.3...v1.5

Portlint is fine.
